sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 110:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section V, List of Answers on Topics 110:1
items.html: Hesed and Gevura, which are opposite HB, are the phase of the Rosh of the ZAT. Tifferet and Netzah are the phase of Toch of the ZAT. One is from the perspective of the light, and the other is from the perspective of the vessel, as in answer 151. Hod, Yesod, Malchut, are the phase of Sof of the ZAT since Hod is the fifth edge of the five edges, corresponding to Malchut in the five phases, and Yesod and Malchut are extended from it. (There)
